message.content:
import { Map, Swords, Trophy, Target, Shield, Sparkles, Zap, Search, Star } from 'lucide-react'
import { Callout } from '@/components/mdx/Callout'
import { Card, CardGrid } from '@/components/mdx/CardGrid'
import { Checklist } from '@/components/mdx/Checklist'
import { FAQ } from '@/components/mdx/FAQ'
import { Steps, Step } from '@/components/mdx/Steps'
import { Section } from '@/components/mdx/Section'
import { YouTubeEmbed } from '@/components/mdx/YouTubeEmbed'

export const metadata = {
  title: "Bizarre Lineage Rarity: Complete Stand Guide & Tier List 2026",
  description: "Master the bizarre lineage rarity system in 2026. Discover the best stands, farming methods for rare items, and the latest PvP/PvE tier list rankings.",
  category: "Guide",
  image: "https://placehold.co/800x400/1e293b/fff?text=Bizarre+Lineage+Rarity+Guide",
  date: "2026-03-04",
  author: "Bizarre Lineage Wiki Team"
}

<Callout type="info" title="Quick Guide">
- **Bizarre lineage rarity** determines the base power and complexity of a stand's moveset, ranging from Common to Mythical.
- **Whitesnake and Made in Heaven** remain the most coveted Mythical pulls for high-level competitive play in 2026.
- **Stand Arrows** are the primary currency for rolling new abilities; farm them through world events and meteor spawns.
- **Lucky Arrows** are essential for players seeking rare stand skins and enhanced cosmetic effects.
- **Always store stands** in your Stand Storage before using a new arrow to prevent permanent loss of your current ability.
</Callout>

In the competitive landscape of Roblox gaming, understanding the **bizarre lineage rarity** system is the difference between struggling against basic mobs and dominating the leaderboard. Bizarre Lineage offers a deep, luck-based progression system where players roll for "Stands"—supernatural manifestations with unique combat abilities. As of March 2026, the meta has shifted significantly, introducing new evolution paths and balancing changes that make certain rare pulls more valuable than ever before. Whether you are a newcomer looking for your first Uncommon stand or a veteran hunting for Mythical evolutions like Made in Heaven, this guide provides the comprehensive data you need. We will explore the specific drop rates, the best farming locations for Stand Arrows, and a detailed breakdown of how rarity impacts your overall DPS in both PvP and PvE scenarios.

<Section icon={Search} title="Understanding Bizarre Lineage Rarity Tiers">

The core of the game revolves around five distinct rarity tiers. Each tier represents the difficulty of obtaining a stand and generally correlates with its combat effectiveness. While a high-rarity stand like a Legendary or Mythical usually outperforms a Common one, some lower-tier stands offer niche utility that can be useful in the early game.

**Video Highlights:**
- Learn the fastest way to farm rare chests and items.
- Discover why Anubis is considered a top-tier PvE farming stand.
- Visual guide on obtaining Dio's Bone and Lucky Arrows.

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="8VeYswWpqwo" title="How To Farm ALL RARE ITEMS Fast in Bizarre Lineage" />

The following table breaks down every stand currently available in the game, categorized by their official rarity and primary moveset.

| Stand | Rarity | Primary Moveset |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Red Hot Chili Pepper | Common | Thunder God, Flash, Electrical Surge |
| Magician's Red | Uncommon | Flame Punch, Crossfire Hurricane, Ignition Burst |
| The Hand | Uncommon | Erasure Swipe, Erasure Pull, Erasure Launch |
| Purple Haze | Uncommon | Infection Frenzy, Infectious Bulb, Bulb Smash |
| Crazy Diamond | Uncommon | Heavy Punch, Bearing Shot, Heal Mode, Wall Smash |
| Golden Experience | Uncommon | Soul Strike, Restoration, Root Strike, Frog |
| Anubis | Rare | Rend, Dice Out, Cursed Severance, Flash Strike |
| Killer Queen | Rare | Primary Bomb, Sheer Heart Attack, Stray Cat |
| Weather Report | Rare | Howling Blitz, Frog Downpour, Ice Nova |
| Stone Free | Rare | Sting Punch, String Trap, String Bandage |
| Star Platinum | Legendary | Star Finger, Skull Crusher, Time Stop |
| The World | Legendary | Hard Fight, Knives, Timestop, Kick Volley |
| King Crimson | Legendary | Chop, Impale, Time Erase, Epitaph |
| The World High Voltage | Legendary | Spin Kick, Revolver Barrage, Time Stop |
| Whitesnake | Mythical | Sweep Kick, Revolver, Disc Extraction |
| C Moon | Mythical | Gravity Barrage, Surface Inversion, Gravity Shift |
| Made in Heaven | Mythical | Speed Slash, Double Accel, Time Acceleration |

<Callout type="tip" title="Pro Rarity Tip">
While Mythical stands have the highest **bizarre lineage rarity**, do not ignore Rare stands like Weather Report. Their area-of-effect (AoE) capabilities often make them superior for farming multiple mobs simultaneously compared to single-target Mythicals.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Zap} title="How to Obtain Stand Arrows and Rare Items">

To interact with the **bizarre lineage rarity** system, you must acquire Stand Arrows. These items are the only way to "roll" for a new stand. In 2026, the methods for obtaining these have expanded to include world events and specific boss raids.

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Redeem Active Codes">
    Check the latest community boards for Bizarre Lineage codes. These often provide 5-10 free Stand Arrows for new players to jumpstart their journey.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="Complete Storyline Quests">
    The main tutorial and storyline provide a guaranteed path to your first few arrows. Repeatable gang contracts can provide up to 3 arrows per completion.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="Scout Meteor Spawns">
    Stand Arrows randomly spawn near Bus Stops, but Meteor Spawns are the gold mine. A single meteor can drop between 7 and 10 arrows if you reach it first.
  </Step>
  <Step num="4" title="Participate in World Events">
    Head to Morioh Station near Bus Stop 8. Completing Team Deathmatch or Graveyard Uprising events rewards players with high-rarity chests containing arrows.
  </Step>
</Steps>

<Callout type="warning" title="Critical Warning">
Using a Stand Arrow while already possessing a stand will **overwrite** your current ability. You must purchase additional Stand Storage slots (available via Prestige or Robux) to keep multiple stands.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Trophy} title="2026 Stand Tier List: PvP and PvE Rankings">

Rarity does not always equal victory. The current meta distinguishes between stands that excel in one-on-one duels (PvP) and those built for grinding resources (PvE). Based on the latest 2026 performance data, we have categorized the top performers to help you decide which **bizarre lineage rarity** pull is worth keeping in your storage.

<CardGrid cols={3}>
  <Card title="Whitesnake (Mythical)">
    - **Tier: S+**
    - Best all-around stand.
    - Features high CC (Crowd Control) and damage over time.
    - Excellent for both PvP and boss farming.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Made in Heaven (Mythical)">
    - **Tier: S**
    - Unmatched mobility in PvP.
    - Difficult to hit due to speed buffs.
    - Lower PvE utility due to single-target focus.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Weather Report (Rare)">
    - **Tier: A+**
    - The king of PvE grinding.
    - Massive AoE moves that clear rooms instantly.
    - High flexibility in combo potential.
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

The following table compares the efficiency of top-tier stands across different game modes:

| Stand | PvP Score | PvE Score | Difficulty |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Whitesnake** | 10/10 | 9/10 | Moderate |
| **Star Platinum** | 9/10 | 6/10 | Easy |
| **King Crimson** | 9/10 | 5/10 | Hard |
| **Weather Report** | 7/10 | 10/10 | Easy |
| **The World** | 8/10 | 8/10 | Moderate |
| **Anubis** | 6/10 | 9/10 | Moderate |

<Callout type="success" title="Strategy Recommendation">
If you pull Anubis, keep it for farming! When paired with Mista's style, Anubis allows you to clear rare chests in under 20 seconds, making it the most efficient way to hunt for Dio's Bone and other legendary drops.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Shield} title="Sub-Abilities and Character Progression">

Beyond the **bizarre lineage rarity** of your stand, your character's sub-ability plays a massive role in your combat effectiveness. These sub-abilities provide passive buffs and additional skill trees that complement your stand's moveset.

| Sub-Ability | Rank | Primary Benefit |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Vampire** | S | High health regeneration and lifesteal. |
| **Cyborg** | A | Enhanced defense and ranged projectile options. |
| **The Ripple** | B | Increased damage against undead and basic stat buffs. |
| **Human** | C | Basic progression with no significant buffs. |

You can also enhance your character through Stand Conjuration. Unlike stands, conjuration passives are permanent and stay with your character even if you roll a new stand. This allows for long-term power scaling regardless of your current luck with arrows.

<Callout type="info" title="Evolution Path">
Certain Mythical stands require an evolution process. For example, you must first obtain Whitesnake, evolve it into C-Moon, and finally reach the pinnacle of Made in Heaven. This requires specific quest items and high Prestige levels.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Star} title="Final Progression Checklist">

To ensure you are making the most of the **bizarre lineage rarity** system, follow this checklist to optimize your character for the late-game challenges of 2026.

<Checklist
  id="bizarre-lineage-goals"
  title="Essential Progression Milestones:"
  items={[
    "Reach Prestige 1 to unlock basic Stand Storage",
    "Farm at least 50 Stand Arrows from Meteor Spawns",
    "Obtain a Rare or higher PvE stand for efficient grinding",
    "Unlock the Vampire sub-ability for maximum survivability",
    "Complete the Dio's Bone quest to unlock high-tier evolutions",
    "Master the Time Stop mechanic for Legendary stands"
  ]}
/>

<Callout type="tip" title="Community Secret">
Participating in the "Morioh Station" world event during peak hours increases your chances of finding Legendary Chests, as team-based objectives are completed faster by the community.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Swords} title="Frequently Asked Questions">

<FAQ items={[
  {
    question: "What is the absolute best stand for bizarre lineage rarity hunters?",
    answer: "Whitesnake is widely considered the best overall stand due to its versatility in both PvP and PvE. However, for pure farming speed, Anubis or Weather Report are often preferred."
  },
  {
    question: "How do I get more Stand Storage slots without spending Robux?",
    answer: "You can earn additional storage slots by increasing your Prestige level. Each Prestige rank typically grants more flexibility in managing your stand collection."
  },
  {
    question: "Do Lucky Arrows guarantee a Mythical stand?",
    answer: "No, Lucky Arrows significantly increase the chance of getting a high-rarity stand and guarantee a Stand Skin, but the specific pull is still subject to the game's RNG system."
  },
  {
    question: "Can I lose my stand if I use a regular Arrow?",
    answer: "Yes. If you do not store your current stand in the Stand Storage menu before using a new Arrow, your old stand will be permanently deleted."
  }
]} />

</Section>
